# gochickpeas canonical plan-shape golden.
# Regenerate deliberately after an intended planner change:
#   gqlbench -manifest <...> -plans-golden <this file> -plans-golden-capture
# A diff here is a review prompt: the planner moved a plan.

=== BI/Q1
Segment 0
  NodeScan (message:Message)
  Filter (message.creationDate < zoned_datetime('2011-12-01'))
  Aggregate (group=[]; count(message))
Segment 1
  Project [totalMessageCountInt, totalMessageCount]
Segment 2
  NodeScan (message:Message)
  Filter (message.creationDate < zoned_datetime('2011-12-01') AND message.content IS NOT NULL)
  Project [totalMessageCountInt, totalMessageCount, message, year]
Segment 3
  Project [totalMessageCountInt, totalMessageCount, message, year, isComment]
Segment 4
  Project [totalMessageCountInt, totalMessageCount, message, year, isComment, lengthCategory]
Segment 5
  Aggregate (group=[totalMessageCount, year, isComment, lengthCategory]; count(message), sum(message.length), count(message), sum(message.length))
Segment 6
  Project [year, isComment, lengthCategory, messageCount, averageMessageLength, sumMessageLength, percentageOfMessages]
  OrderBy [year DESC, isComment, lengthCategory]

=== BI/Q2
Segment 0
  NodeByProperty (_:TagClass {name = 'MusicalArtist'})
    [anchor: :TagClass {name} card=N, fan-out N · vs tag:Tag card=N, fan-out ~N → smaller leaf cardinality]
  Expand (_)<-[:HAS_TYPE]-(tag)
  Argument (tag)
  Expand (tag)<-[:HAS_TAG]-(message1)
  Filter (zoned_datetime('2012-06-01') <= message1.creationDate AND message1.creationDate < zoned_datetime('2012-06-01') + duration('P100D'))
  Aggregate (group=[tag]; count(message1))
Segment 1
  Argument (tag)
  Expand (tag)<-[:HAS_TAG]-(message2)
  Filter (zoned_datetime('2012-06-01') + duration('P100D') <= message2.creationDate AND message2.creationDate < zoned_datetime('2012-06-01') + duration('P200D'))
  Aggregate (group=[tag, countWindow1]; count(message2))
Segment 2
  Project [tagName, countWindow1, countWindow2, diff]
  OrderBy [diff DESC, tagName]
  Limit 100

=== BI/Q3
NodeByProperty (_:Country {name = 'Burma'})
  [anchor: :Country {name} card=N, fan-out N · vs :TagClass {name} card=N, fan-out N → smaller first-hop degree (hub-aware)]
Expand (_)<-[:IS_PART_OF]-(_)
Expand (_)<-[:IS_LOCATED_IN]-(person)
Expand (person)<-[:HAS_MODERATOR]-(forum)
Expand (forum)-[:CONTAINER_OF]->(post)
VarExpand (post)<-[:REPLY_OF*0..]-(message)
Expand (message)-[:HAS_TAG]->(_)
Expand (_)-[:HAS_TYPE]->(_)
Aggregate (group=[forumId, forumTitle, forumCreationDate, personId]; count(DISTINCT message))
OrderBy [messageCount DESC, forumId]
Limit 20

=== BI/Q4
Segment 0
  NodeScan (country:Country)
    [anchor: country:Country card=N, fan-out ~N · vs forum:Forum card=N, fan-out ~N → smaller leaf cardinality]
  Expand (country)<-[:IS_PART_OF]-(_)
  Expand (_)<-[:IS_LOCATED_IN]-(person)
  Expand (person)<-[:HAS_MEMBER]-(forum)
  Filter (forum.creationDate > zoned_datetime('2010-01-29'))
  Aggregate (group=[country, forum]; count(person))
Segment 1
  Project [country, forum, numberOfMembers]
  OrderBy [numberOfMembers DESC, forum.id, country.id]
Segment 2
  Distinct Project [topForum]
  Limit 100
Segment 3
  Aggregate (group=[]; collect(topForum))
Segment 4
  CallSubquery [person, messageCount]
      Branch 0
        Segment 0
          Project [topForums]
        Segment 1
          Unwind (topForums AS topForum1)
          Argument (topForum1)
          Expand (topForum1)-[:CONTAINER_OF]->(post)
          VarExpand (post)<-[:REPLY_OF*0..]-(message)
          Expand (message)-[:HAS_CREATOR]->(person)
          Expand (person)<-[:HAS_MEMBER]-(topForum2)
          Filter (topForum2 IN topForums)
          Aggregate (group=[person]; count(DISTINCT message))
      UNION ALL
      Branch 1
        Segment 0
          Project [topForums]
        Segment 1
          Unwind (topForums AS topForum1)
          Argument (topForum1:Forum)
          Expand (topForum1)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(person)
          Project [person, messageCount]
  Aggregate (group=[personId]; sum(messageCount))
  OrderBy [messageCount DESC, personId]
  Limit 100

=== BI/Q5
Segment 0
  NodeByProperty (tag:Tag {name = 'Abbas_I_of_Persia'})
    [anchor: tag:Tag {name} card=N, fan-out N,N · vs person:Person card=N, fan-out ~N → smaller leaf cardinality]
  Expand (tag)<-[:HAS_TAG]-(message)
  Expand (message)-[:HAS_CREATOR]->(person)
  Argument (message)
  Expand (message)<-[:LIKES]-(_)
  Aggregate (group=[person, message]; count(likes))
Segment 1
  Argument (message)
  Expand (message)<-[:REPLY_OF]-(reply)
  Aggregate (group=[person, message, likeCount]; count(reply))
Segment 2
  Aggregate (group=[person]; count(message), sum(likeCount), sum(replyCount))
Segment 3
  Project [personId, replyCount, likeCount, messageCount, score]
  OrderBy [score DESC, personId]
  Limit 100

=== BI/Q6
NodeByProperty (tag:Tag {name = 'Arnold_Schwarzenegger'})
  [anchor: tag:Tag {name} card=N, fan-out N,N · vs personN:Person card=N, fan-out ~N → smaller leaf cardinality]
Expand (tag)<-[:HAS_TAG]-(message1)
Expand (message1)-[:HAS_CREATOR]->(person1)
Argument (message1)
Expand (message1)<-[:LIKES]-(person2)
Argument (person2)
Expand (person2)<-[:HAS_CREATOR]-(message2)
Expand (message2)<-[:LIKES]-(person3)
Aggregate (group=[person1Id]; count(DISTINCT like))
OrderBy [authorityScore DESC, person1Id]
Limit 100

=== BI/Q7
NodeByProperty (tag:Tag {name = 'Enrique_Iglesias'})
  [anchor: tag:Tag {name} card=N, fan-out N,N · vs message:Message card=N, fan-out ~N → smaller leaf cardinality]
Expand (tag)<-[:HAS_TAG]-(message)
Argument (message)
Expand (message)<-[:REPLY_OF]-(comment)
Expand (comment)-[:HAS_TAG]->(relatedTag)
Filter (NOT EXISTS {…})
Aggregate (group=[relatedTagName]; count(DISTINCT comment))
OrderBy [commentCount DESC, relatedTagName]
Limit 100

=== BI/Q8
Segment 0
  NodeByProperty (tag:Tag {name = 'Che_Guevara'})
  NodeByExistsSeed (person:Person, 2 chain(s))
  Filter (EXISTS {…} OR EXISTS {…})
  Project [tag, person]
Segment 1
  Project [tag, person, score]
Segment 2
  Argument (person)
  Expand (person)-[:KNOWS]-(friend)
  Project [person, score, friendScore]
Segment 3
  Aggregate (group=[person.id, score]; sum(friendScore))
  OrderBy [score + friendsScore DESC, person.id]
  Limit 100

=== BI/Q9
NodeScan (person:Person)
  [anchor: person:Person card=N, fan-out ~N · vs reply:Message card=N, fan-out ~N → smaller leaf cardinality]
Expand (person)<-[:HAS_CREATOR]-(post)
VarExpand (post)<-[:REPLY_OF*0..]-(reply)
Filter (post.creationDate >= zoned_datetime('2011-10-01') AND post.creationDate < zoned_datetime('2011-10-16') AND reply.creationDate >= zoned_datetime('2011-10-01') AND reply.creationDate < zoned_datetime('2011-10-16'))
Aggregate (group=[person.id]; count(DISTINCT post), count(DISTINCT reply))
OrderBy [messageCount DESC, person.id]
Limit 100

=== BI/Q10
Segment 0
  NodeByProperty (s:Person {id = 3470})
  NodeByProperty (_:Country {name = 'China'})
    [anchor: :Country {name} card=N, fan-out N · vs expert:Person card=N, fan-out ~N → smaller leaf cardinality]
  Expand (_)<-[:IS_PART_OF]-(_)
  Expand (_)<-[:IS_LOCATED_IN]-(expert)
  Gate (ShortestPath (s)-[*]-(expert), dist >= 3)
  Argument (expert)
  Expand (expert)<-[:HAS_CREATOR]-(message)
  Expand (message)-[:HAS_TAG]->(_)
  Expand (_)-[:HAS_TYPE]->(_)
  Argument (message)
  Expand (message)-[:HAS_TAG]->(tag)
  Project [s, expert, message, tag]
Segment 1
  ShortestPath (s)-[*]-(expert)
  Project [s, expert, message, tag, p, dist]
Segment 2
  Project [s, expert, message, tag, p, dist]
  Filter (dist >= 3)
Segment 3
  Aggregate (group=[eid, tagName]; count(DISTINCT message))
  OrderBy [messageCount DESC, tagName, eid]
  Limit 100

=== BI/Q11
Segment 0
  NodeByProperty (country:Country {name = 'India'})
    [anchor: country:Country {name} card=N, fan-out N · vs a:Person card=N, fan-out ~N → smaller leaf cardinality]
  Expand (country)<-[:IS_PART_OF]-(_)
  Expand (_)<-[:IS_LOCATED_IN]-(a)
  Argument (a)
  Expand (a)-[:KNOWS]-(b)
  Filter (a.id < b.id AND zoned_datetime('2012-09-29') <= k1.creationDate AND k1.creationDate <= zoned_datetime('2013-01-01'))
  Distinct Project [country, a, b]
Segment 1
  Argument (b)
  Expand (b)-[:IS_LOCATED_IN]->(_)
  Expand (_)-[:IS_PART_OF]->(country) [into bound]
  Distinct Project [country, a, b]
Segment 2
  Argument (b)
  Expand (b)-[:KNOWS]-(c)
  Argument (c)
  Expand (c)-[:IS_LOCATED_IN]->(_)
  Expand (_)-[:IS_PART_OF]->(country) [into bound]
  Filter (b.id < c.id AND zoned_datetime('2012-09-29') <= k2.creationDate AND k2.creationDate <= zoned_datetime('2013-01-01'))
  Distinct Project [a, b, c]
Segment 3
  Argument (c)
  Expand (c)-[:KNOWS]-(a) [into bound]
  Filter (zoned_datetime('2012-09-29') <= k3.creationDate AND k3.creationDate <= zoned_datetime('2013-01-01'))
  Distinct Project [a, b, c]
Segment 4
  Aggregate (group=[]; count(*))

=== BI/Q12
Segment 0
  NodeScan (person:Person)
  Argument (person)
  Expand (person)<-[:HAS_CREATOR]-(message)
  VarExpand (message)-[:REPLY_OF*0..]->(post)
  Filter (message.content IS NOT NULL AND message.length < 20 AND message.creationDate > zoned_datetime('2010-07-22') AND post.language IN ['ar', 'hu'])
  Aggregate (group=[person]; count(message))
Segment 1
  Aggregate (group=[messageCount]; count(person))
  OrderBy [personCount DESC, messageCount DESC]

=== BI/Q13
Segment 0
  NodeByProperty (country:Country {name = 'France'})
    [anchor: country:Country {name} card=N, fan-out N · vs zombie:Person card=N, fan-out ~N → smaller leaf cardinality]
  Expand (country)<-[:IS_PART_OF]-(_)
  Expand (_)<-[:IS_LOCATED_IN]-(zombie)
  Filter (zombie.creationDate < zoned_datetime('2013-01-01'))
  Argument (zombie)
  Expand (zombie)<-[:HAS_CREATOR]-(message)
  Filter (message.creationDate < zoned_datetime('2013-01-01'))
  Aggregate (group=[country, zombie]; count(message))
Segment 1
  Project [country, zombie, messageCount, months]
Segment 2
  Project [country, zombie, messageCount, months]
  Filter (messageCount / months < 1)
Segment 3
  Aggregate (group=[country]; collect(zombie))
Segment 4
  Unwind (zombies AS zombie)
  Argument (zombie)
  Expand (zombie)<-[:HAS_CREATOR]-(message)
  Expand (message)<-[:LIKES]-(likerZombie)
  Filter (likerZombie IN zombies)
  Aggregate (group=[zombie]; count(likerZombie))
Segment 5
  Argument (zombie)
  Expand (zombie)<-[:HAS_CREATOR]-(message)
  Expand (message)<-[:LIKES]-(likerPerson)
  Filter (likerPerson.creationDate < zoned_datetime('2013-01-01'))
  Aggregate (group=[zombie, zombieLikeCount]; count(likerPerson))
Segment 6
  Project [zombie, zombieLikeCount, totalLikeCount, zombieScore]
Segment 7
  Project [zombie, zombieLikeCount, totalLikeCount, zombieScore]
  OrderBy [zombieScore DESC, zombie.id]
  Limit 100
Segment 8
  Project [zombieId, zombieLikeCount, totalLikeCount]

=== BI/Q14
Segment 0
  NodeByProperty (country1:Country {name = 'Chile'})
    [anchor: countryN:Country {name} card=N, fan-out N · vs personN:Person card=N, fan-out ~N → smaller leaf cardinality]
  Expand (country1)<-[:IS_PART_OF]-(city1)
  Expand (city1)<-[:IS_LOCATED_IN]-(person1)
  Argument (person1)
  Expand (person1)-[:KNOWS]-(person2)
  Argument (person2:Person)
  Expand (person2)-[:IS_LOCATED_IN]->(city2)
  Expand (city2)-[:IS_PART_OF]->(country2)
  Project [person1, person2, city1, score]
Segment 1
  Argument (person1)
  Expand (person1)<-[:HAS_CREATOR]-(c)
  Expand (c)-[:REPLY_OF]->(_)
  Expand (_)-[:HAS_CREATOR]->(person2) [into bound]
  Distinct Project [person1, person2, city1, score]
Segment 2
  Argument (person2)
  Expand (person2)<-[:HAS_CREATOR]-(_)
  Expand (_)-[:REPLY_OF]->(m)
  Expand (m)-[:HAS_CREATOR]->(person1) [into bound]
  Distinct Project [person1, person2, city1, score]
Segment 3
  Argument (person1)
  Expand (person1)-[:LIKES]->(m)
  Expand (m)-[:HAS_CREATOR]->(person2) [into bound]
  Distinct Project [person1, person2, city1, score]
Segment 4
  Argument (person2)
  Expand (person2)-[:LIKES]->(m)
  Expand (m)-[:HAS_CREATOR]->(person1) [into bound]
  Distinct Project [person1, person2, city1, score]
Segment 5
  Project [person1, person2, city1, score]
  OrderBy [city1.name, score DESC, person1.id, person2.id]
Segment 6
  Aggregate (group=[city1]; collect(person1.id), collect(person2.id), collect(score))
Segment 7
  Project [topPerson1Id, topPerson2Id, cityName, topScore]
  OrderBy [topScore DESC, topPerson1Id, topPerson2Id]
  Limit 100

=== BI/Q15
NodeByProperty (a:Person {id = 14})
NodeByProperty (b:Person {id = 16})
WeightedShortestPath (a)-[*]-(b)
Unwind (rels(p) AS e)
Aggregate (group=[]; sum(e.w))

=== BI/Q16
Segment 0
  NodeByProperty (tagA:Tag {name = 'Meryl_Streep'})
    [anchor: tagA:Tag {name} card=N, fan-out N,N · vs personN:Person card=N, fan-out ~N → smaller leaf cardinality]
  Expand (tagA)<-[:HAS_TAG]-(messageA)
  Expand (messageA)-[:HAS_CREATOR]->(person1)
  Filter (date(messageA.creationDate) = date(zoned_datetime('2012-09-16')))
  Argument (tagA)
  Expand (tagA)<-[:HAS_TAG]-(messageA2)
  Expand (messageA2)-[:HAS_CREATOR]->(personA2)
  Expand (personA2)-[:KNOWS]-(person1) [into bound]
  Filter (date(messageA2.creationDate) = date(zoned_datetime('2012-09-16')))
  Aggregate (group=[person1]; count(DISTINCT messageA), count(DISTINCT personA2))
Segment 1
  Project [person1, messageCountA, knowsA]
  Filter (knowsA <= 4)
Segment 2
  Argument (person1)
  Expand (person1)<-[:HAS_CREATOR]-(messageB)
  Expand (messageB)-[:HAS_TAG]->(tagB)
  Filter (date(messageB.creationDate) = date(zoned_datetime('2012-05-08')))
  Argument (tagB)
  Expand (tagB)<-[:HAS_TAG]-(messageB2)
  Expand (messageB2)-[:HAS_CREATOR]->(personB2)
  Expand (personB2)-[:KNOWS]-(person1) [into bound]
  Filter (date(messageB2.creationDate) = date(zoned_datetime('2012-05-08')))
  Aggregate (group=[person1, messageCountA]; count(DISTINCT messageB), count(DISTINCT personB2))
Segment 3
  Project [person1, messageCountA, messageCountB, knowsB]
  Filter (knowsB <= 4)
Segment 4
  Project [personId, messageCountA, messageCountB]
  OrderBy [messageCountA + messageCountB DESC, personId]
  Limit 20

=== BI/Q17
NodeByProperty (tag:Tag {name = 'Slavoj_Žižek'})
Argument (tag)
Expand (tag)<-[:HAS_TAG]-(message1)
Argument (message1:Message)
Expand (message1)-[:HAS_CREATOR]->(person1)
Argument (message1:Message)
VarExpand (message1)-[:REPLY_OF*0..]->(post1)
Expand (post1)<-[:CONTAINER_OF]-(forum1)
HashJoin (key=person3, probe (forum1)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(person3))
  build: Argument (tag)
  build: Expand (tag)<-[:HAS_TAG]-(comment)
  build: Argument (comment)
  build: Expand (comment)-[:REPLY_OF]->(message2)
  build: Argument (message2)
  build: Expand (message2)-[:HAS_TAG]->(tag) [into bound]
  build: Argument (message2:Message)
  build: Expand (message2)-[:HAS_CREATOR]->(person3)
  build: Argument (comment:Comment)
  build: Expand (comment)-[:HAS_CREATOR]->(person2)
  build: Argument (comment:Comment)
  build: Expand (comment)-[:HAS_TAG]->(tag) [into bound]
Filter (message2.creationDate > message1.creationDate + duration({hours: 4}))
VarExpand (message2)-[:REPLY_OF*0..]->(post2)
Expand (post2)<-[:CONTAINER_OF]-(forum2)
Filter (forum1 <> forum2 AND NOT EXISTS {…})
Expand (person2)<-[:HAS_MEMBER]-(forum1) [into bound]
Aggregate (group=[person1.id]; count(DISTINCT message2))
OrderBy [messageCount DESC, person1.id]
Limit 10

=== BI/Q18
NodeByProperty (tag:Tag {name = 'Frank_Sinatra'})
  [anchor: tag:Tag {name} card=N, fan-out N · vs tag card=N, fan-out ~N → smaller leaf cardinality]
Expand (tag)<-[:HAS_INTEREST]-(person1)
Expand (person1)-[:KNOWS]-(mutualFriend)
Expand (mutualFriend)-[:KNOWS]-(person2)
Expand (person2)-[:HAS_INTEREST]->(tag) [into bound]
Filter (person1 <> person2 AND NOT EXISTS {…})
Aggregate (group=[person1Id, person2Id]; count(DISTINCT mutualFriend))
OrderBy [mutualFriendCount DESC, person1Id, person2Id]
Limit 20

=== BI/Q19
NodeByProperty (_:City {id = 669})
  [anchor: :City {id} card=N, fan-out N · vs a:Person card=N, fan-out ~N → smaller leaf cardinality]
Expand (_)<-[:IS_LOCATED_IN]-(a)
NodeByProperty (_:City {id = 648})
  [anchor: :City {id} card=N, fan-out N · vs b:Person card=N, fan-out ~N → smaller leaf cardinality]
Expand (_)<-[:IS_LOCATED_IN]-(b)
WeightedShortestPath (a)-[*]-(b)
Unwind (rels(p) AS e)
Aggregate (group=[p1, p2]; sum(e.w))
OrderBy [dist, p1, p2]
Limit 20

=== BI/Q20
NodeByProperty (p2:Person {id = 66})
NodeByProperty (c:Company {name = 'Falcon_Air'})
  [anchor: c:Company {name} card=N, fan-out N · vs pN:Person card=N, fan-out ~N → smaller leaf cardinality]
Expand (c)<-[:WORK_AT]-(p1)
WeightedShortestPath (p1)-[*]-(p2)
Unwind (rels(p) AS e)
Aggregate (group=[pid]; sum(e.w))
OrderBy [dist, pid]
Limit 20

=== FinBench/CR1
Segment 0
  NodeByProperty (s:Account {id = 4877400870343548146})
  Argument (s)
  VarExpand (s)<-[:transfer*1..3]-(o) [mono createTime desc]
  Project [s, o, p, ts]
Segment 1
  Project [s, o, p, ts]
Segment 2
  Aggregate (group=[o]; min(size(ts)))
Segment 3
  Argument (o)
  Expand (o)<-[:signIn]-(m)
  Filter (m.isBlocked = true)
  Project [oid, dist, mid, mtype]

=== FinBench/CR2
Segment 0
  NodeByProperty (per:Person {id = 24189255841071})
    [anchor: per:Person {id} card=N, fan-out N · vs oa:Account card=N, fan-out ~N → smaller leaf cardinality]
  Expand (per)-[:own]->(oa)
  Argument (oa)
  VarExpand (oa)<-[:transfer*1..3]-(acct) [mono createTime desc]
  Project [per, oa, acct, p, ts]
Segment 1
  Project [per, oa, acct, p, ts]
  Filter (acct <> oa)
Segment 2
  Distinct Project [oa, acct]
Segment 3
  Argument (acct)
  Expand (acct)<-[:deposit]-(loan)
  Distinct Project [oa, acct, loan]
Segment 4
  Aggregate (group=[oa, acct]; sum(loan.loanAmount), sum(loan.balance))
Segment 5
  Aggregate (group=[acct]; sum(amt), sum(bal))
Segment 6
  Project [aid, tamt, tbal]

=== FinBench/CR3
NodeByProperty (a:Account {id = 234469755111622579})
NodeByProperty (b:Account {id = 304838499289284059})
ShortestPath (a)-[*]-(b)
Project [hops]

=== FinBench/CR4
NodeByProperty (a:Account {id = 4877400870343548146})
  [anchor: a:Account {id} card=N, fan-out N · vs a card=N, fan-out ~N → smaller leaf cardinality]
Expand (a)-[:transfer]->(n1)
Expand (n1)-[:transfer]->(a) [into bound]
Filter (a <> n1 AND t1.amount >= 1000 AND t2.amount >= 1000 AND t1.createTime < t2.createTime AND t2.createTime <= t1.createTime + 7776000000)
Project [aid, n1id]

=== FinBench/CR5
Segment 0
  NodeByProperty (per:Person {id = 24189255841071})
    [anchor: per:Person {id} card=N, fan-out N · vs start:Account card=N, fan-out ~N → smaller leaf cardinality]
  Expand (per)-[:own]->(start)
  Argument (start)
  VarExpand (start)-[:transfer*1..3]->(d) [mono createTime asc]
  Project [per, start, d, p, ts]
Segment 1
  Project [per, start, d, p, ts, t]
Segment 2
  Project [per, start, d, p, ts, t]
Segment 3
  Distinct Project [t]
  OrderBy [size(t) DESC]

=== FinBench/CR6
Segment 0
  NodeByProperty (card:Account {id = 240943129820355424})
    [anchor: card:Account {id} card=N, fan-out N · vs  card=N, fan-out ~N → smaller leaf cardinality]
  Expand (card)-[:withdraw]->(_)
  Aggregate (group=[card]; sum(w.amount), max(w.createTime))
Segment 1
  Argument (card)
  Expand (card)<-[:transfer]-(src)
  Filter (t.createTime <= lw)
  Aggregate (group=[sid, tw]; sum(t.amount))

=== FinBench/CR7
Segment 0
  NodeByProperty (a:Account {id = 234469755111622579})
  Argument (a)
  Expand (a)<-[:transfer]-(src)
  Aggregate (group=[a]; count(DISTINCT src), sum(ti.amount))
Segment 1
  Argument (a)
  Expand (a)-[:transfer]->(dst)
  Aggregate (group=[ns, ia]; count(DISTINCT dst), sum(to.amount))
Segment 2
  Project [num_src, num_dst, ratio]

=== FinBench/CR8
Segment 0
  NodeByProperty (loan:Loan {id = 279505201629616671})
    [anchor: loan:Loan {id} card=N, fan-out N · vs acct:Account card=N, fan-out ~N → smaller leaf cardinality]
  Expand (loan)-[:deposit]->(acct)
  Aggregate (group=[loanAmount]; collect(acct), collect(d.amount))
Segment 1
  Call algo.propagate(…) [correlated, 8 args]
  Project [dstId, ratio, distanceFromLoan]
  OrderBy [distanceFromLoan DESC, ratio DESC, dstId]

=== FinBench/CR9
Segment 0
  NodeByProperty (a:Account {id = 234469755111622579})
  Argument (a)
  Expand (a)-[:repay]->(_)
  Aggregate (group=[a]; sum(r1.amount))
Segment 1
  Argument (a)
  Expand (a)<-[:deposit]-(_)
  Aggregate (group=[a, s1]; sum(r2.amount))
Segment 2
  Argument (a)
  Expand (a)-[:transfer]->(_)
  Aggregate (group=[a, s1, s2]; sum(r3.amount))
Segment 3
  Argument (a)
  Expand (a)<-[:transfer]-(_)
  Aggregate (group=[s1, s2, s3]; sum(r4.amount))
Segment 4
  Project [rr, rd, rt]

=== FinBench/CR10
NodeByProperty (p1:Person {id = 28587302363231})
  [anchor: pN:Person {id} card=N, fan-out N · vs pN card=N, fan-out ~N → smaller leaf cardinality]
Expand (p1)-[:invest]->(c)
Expand (c)<-[:invest]-(p2)
Filter (p2 <> p1)
Aggregate (group=[oid]; count(DISTINCT c))

=== FinBench/CR11
Segment 0
  NodeByProperty (p:Person {id = 26388279096622})
    [anchor: p:Person {id} card=N, fan-out N · vs g:Person card=N, fan-out ~N → smaller leaf cardinality]
  VarExpand (p)-[:guarantee*0..]->(g)
  Distinct Project [g]
Segment 1
  Argument (g)
  Expand (g)-[:apply]->(_)
  Aggregate (group=[]; sum(a.loanAmount))

=== FinBench/CR12
NodeByProperty (p:Person {id = 24189255841071})
  [anchor: p:Person {id} card=N, fan-out N · vs c:Company card=N, fan-out ~N → smaller leaf cardinality]
Expand (p)-[:own]->(a)
Expand (a)-[:transfer]->(ca)
Expand (ca)<-[:own]-(c)
Aggregate (group=[caid]; sum(t.amount))

=== FinBench/SR1

=== FinBench/SR4

  [anchor: src:Account {id} card=N, fan-out N,N · vs dst:Account card=N, fan-out ~N → smaller leaf cardinality]
Expand (src)-[:transfer]->(dst)
Filter (t.amount > 1000)
Aggregate (group=[dstId]; count(t), sum(t.amount))

=== FinBench/SR5

Aggregate (group=[srcId]; count(t), sum(t.amount))

=== FinBench/SR6
NodeByProperty (account:Account {id = 234469755111622579})
  [anchor: account:Account {id} card=N, fan-out N · vs dst:Account card=N, fan-out ~N → smaller leaf cardinality]

=== IC/IC1

=== IC/IC2
Segment 0
  NodeByProperty (p:Person {id = 4398046519825})

=== IC/IC3
Segment 0
  NodeByProperty (p:Person {id = 4398046519825})
    [anchor: p:Person {id} card=N, fan-out N · vs f:Person card=N, fan-out ~N → smaller leaf cardinality]
  VarExpand (p)-[:KNOWS*1..2]-(f)
  Filter (f.id <> 4398046519825)
  Distinct Project [f]
Segment 1
  Project [f]
  Filter (NOT EXISTS {…} AND NOT EXISTS {…})
Segment 2
  Argument (f)
  Expand (f)<-[:HAS_CREATOR]-(m)
  Expand (m)-[:IS_LOCATED_IN]->(c)
  Filter (c.name IN ['China', 'Germany'] AND m.creationDate >= zoned_datetime('2010-01-01') AND m.creationDate < zoned_datetime('2014-02-09'))
  Aggregate (group=[f]; sum(CASE…END), sum(CASE…END))
Segment 3
  Project [f, countryXCount, countryYCount]
  Filter (countryXCount > 0 AND countryYCount > 0)
Segment 4
  Project [personId, countryXCount, countryYCount]
  OrderBy [countryXCount + countryYCount DESC, personId]
  Limit 20

=== IC/IC4
Segment 0
  NodeByProperty (_:Person {id = 4398046519825})
    [anchor: :Person {id} card=N, fan-out N · vs tb:Tag card=N, fan-out ~N → smaller leaf cardinality]

  Expand (_)<-[:HAS_CREATOR]-(pre)
  Expand (pre)-[:HAS_TAG]->(tb)
  Filter (pre.creationDate < zoned_datetime('2011-01-01'))
  Aggregate (group=[]; collect(DISTINCT tb))
Segment 1
  NodeByProperty (_:Person {id = 4398046519825})
    [anchor: :Person {id} card=N, fan-out N · vs t:Tag card=N, fan-out ~N → smaller leaf cardinality]
  Expand (_)-[:KNOWS]-(_)
  Expand (_)<-[:HAS_CREATOR]-(post)
  Expand (post)-[:HAS_TAG]->(t)
  Filter (post.creationDate >= zoned_datetime('2011-01-01') AND post.creationDate < zoned_datetime('2012-01-01') AND NOT t IN before)
  Aggregate (group=[tagName]; count(DISTINCT post))
  OrderBy [postCount DESC, tagName]
  Limit 10

=== IC/IC5

  NodeByProperty (p:Person {id = 4398046519825})

=== SPB/q4

Filter (w.dateCreated IS NOT NULL)
Distinct Project [uri]

=== SPB/q5
Segment 0
  NodeScan (w:BlogPost)
    [anchor: w:BlogPost card=N, fan-out ~N · vs topic card=N, fan-out ~N → smaller leaf cardinality]
  Expand (w)-[:tag]->(topic)
  Filter (topic.label IS NOT NULL AND w.dateModified > '2011-03-01T00:00:00.000+00:00' AND w.dateModified < '2011-06-01T00:00:00.000+00:00' AND EXISTS {…})
  Aggregate (group=[topic]; count(DISTINCT w))
Segment 1
  Project [label, cnt]

=== SPB/q7
NodeScan (w:BlogPost)
Filter (w.dateCreated >= '2011-03-01T00:00:00.000+00:00' AND w.dateCreated <= '2011-06-01T00:00:00.000+00:00' AND w.title IS NOT NULL AND w.liveCoverage IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS {…} AND EXISTS {…})
Distinct Project [uri]

=== SPB/q9
Segment 0
  NodeByProperty (f:CreativeWork {uri = 'http://www.bbc.co.uk/things/9407#id'})
    [anchor: f:CreativeWork {uri} card=N, fan-out N · vs o:CreativeWork card=N, fan-out ~N → smaller leaf cardinality]
  Expand (f)-[:tag]->(e)
  Expand (e)<-[:tag]-(o)
  Filter (o.uri <> 'http://www.bbc.co.uk/things/9407#id' AND o.dateModified IS NOT NULL)
  Distinct Project [f, o, e]
Segment 1
  Aggregate (group=[o]; sum(CASE…END * 4 * CASE…END + 3 * CASE…END + CASE…END * 2 * CASE…END + CASE…END))
Segment 2
  Project [uri, s]
